_comment: Sample config reference. Keys prefixed with _comment are notes for humans and can be removed in real settings.json files.

serial._comment: COM endpoint used by the emulator side of your virtual COM pair (for example COM2 when DOF writes to COM1).
serial._commentBaudRate: TeensyStripController-compatible baud rate used in current MVP path.
serial._commentMaxLedsPerChannel: Safe hardware-compatible ceiling reported to DOF via the M command.
serial._commentMaxStrips: Safe compatibility target from TeensyStripController path.

matrix._comment: Matrix geometry and visual shaping. Width x height should match your DOF cabinet mapping output target.
matrix._commentMapping: Linear DOF LED order -> 2D screen mapping mode.
matrix._commentDotShape: Physical pixel silhouette: circle or square.
matrix._commentGamma: Channel gamma adjustment before optional tone mapping.

toneMapping._comment: Optional highlight compression to avoid clipping at high brightness.

temporalSmoothing._comment: Optional motion smoothing. Lower fallAlpha keeps pixels lit longer.

bloom._comment: Screen-space glow around bright pixels. Disabled for strict/raw output.

visual._comment: Dot lens/body rendering controls for flat vs bulb-like aesthetics.
visual._commentShapeMode: dome = lens attenuation + highlight behavior, flat = flatter emitter style.
visual._commentDomeProfile: Preset curve family: smd-like, diffused-dome, or strong-bulb.
visual._commentEdgeSoftness: 0.05-1.0; higher softens edge transition, lower keeps a crisp edge.
visual._commentOffStateTint: Base tint for unlit lens/body shell.
visual._commentLensFalloff: Controls radial falloff concentration for dome masks.
visual._commentSpecularHotspot: Controls hotspot brightness in the static lens body brush.
visual._commentRimHighlight: Controls edge ring visibility in the static lens body brush.
